programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pitch odd TV shows as execs to the public and work behind the counter at a barbecue restaurant, with the loser facing a psychic named Jesse Bravo

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q work in pairs giving presentations about living life to its fullest, and pose as janitors giving responses to questions and statements over walkie-talkies

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the family's Roman holiday continues, Robert falls in love with sultry local beauty Stefania (Alex Meneses), who works in an ice-cream shop

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie and Frank accidentally crash their car through the wall of Ray's house, causing a bitter family dispute - and forcing Debra into the role of peacemaker. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert believes Amy is the woman of his dreams and decides to tell her the truth about Joanne and Stefania, but she is so shocked by the confession that she refuses to take him back

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray accidentally kills Ally's pet hamster while the kids are away from home for the weekend, so Debra insists they give it a dignified funeral. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is promoted to lieutenant, much to the dismay of Ray, who feels overshadowed and becomes convinced his own prestige is suffering as a result. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes to a wedding, where he finds himself regretting a missed opportunity to escort a high-school date to her door, and is tormented by thoughts of what might have been. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross's Library Book
programme.desc: Janice cajoles Chandler and Monica into inviting her to the wedding. Ross discovers a surprising fact about his doctoral dissertation and the position it occupies in the university library, and Joey's latest date causes him emotional turmoil. Guest starring Kristin Davis (Sex and the City)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesn't Like Dogs
programme.desc: Rachel's assistant Tag spends Thanksgiving with the gang, leading to a series of embarrassing revelations, and a puppy smuggled into the flat by Phoebe unnerves Chandler. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel gets a dressing-down at work for dating Tag, while Monica tries to buy her neighbours' friendship by making sweets for them - but finds their appetites to be greater than her desire to be popular

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Holiday Armadillo
programme.desc: Phoebe plans to return to her flat and tries desperately to persuade Rachel to join her, while Monica is infuriated by Chandler's inability to tip appropriately. Ross looks after Ben during the holiday season, and dresses as an armadillo to keep him entertained

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Cheesecakes
programme.desc: Phoebe's ex-boyfriend arrives back in town and Monica is angry at not being invited to her cousin's wedding. Chandler and Rachel feel guilty for eating a neighbour's cheesecake that was mistakenly delivered to their apartment. Comedy, guest starring Hank Azaria (The Simpsons)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They're Up All Night
programme.desc: Ross and Joey get trapped on the roof while waiting to watch a meteor shower. Monica's exhaustion leads to trouble with Chandler, and Rachel argues with Tag over which of them failed to post a parcel

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe encounters a suicidal office worker during her first day as a telemarketer. Ross and Monica are upset to discover their parents intend to sell their childhood home, while Rachel and Chandler blame themselves for breaking Joey's favourite chair

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: The pals celebrate Rachel's 30th birthday and reminisce about their own, including Monica's attempt to hide her intoxication from her parents, and Ross's embarrassing crisis, which resulted in the purchase of a red sports car. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's New Brain
programme.desc: Joey tells a fellow soap cast member that her character is to be killed off. Rachel and Phoebe sabotage each other's plans to date an attractive man who left his mobile phone in Central Perk, and Ross learns he is not allowed to play the bagpipes at Monica and Chandler's wedding. Guest starring Susan Sarandon

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Truth About London
programme.desc: Chandler hears a startling revelation about how his relationship with Monica almost failed to get off the ground in London. Joey tries to get ordained via the internet and Rachel teaches Ben practical jokes to play on Ross. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Joey and Ross date the same girl, while Monica fights tooth and nail with a fellow bride-to-be for a special wedding dress and the right to hire Chandler's favourite band for the ceremony. David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is nominated for a minor daytime drama award, Monica realises she will never again feel the thrill of a new romance and a student tells Ross he is in love with him. With Matt LeBlanc and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross and Monica's Cousin
programme.desc: Monica is visited by a cousin she has not seen since childhood, whose stunning looks do not go unnoticed by Chandler. Rachel and Phoebe plan a last-minute bridal party, while Joey tries to trick his way into an acting role. Guest starring Denise Richards

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel meets an old college friend and wonders whether she should confront her about a boozy incident from their past that took a dramatic and passionate turn. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross vie to outdo one another in the tuxedo stakes for the impending wedding. Winona Ryder guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: With the wedding only four weeks away, Chandler struggles to write his vows and turns to Joey and Ross for much-needed help. Meanwhile, Monica has similar difficulties and recruits Phoebe and Rachel - but they soon get distracted and start reminiscing

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica convinces a reluctant Chandler to travel to Las Vegas to invite his estranged father to their wedding, while Rachel gets into trouble for driving Monica's Porsche. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner

programme.desc: Marge is distressed when Lisa signs up for the opportunity to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, but a cunning strategy using reverse psychology to discourage her daughter from carrying out her plan goes badly awry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find a devastated Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Lisa gets a leading role in the school production of Casablanca, leaving Milhouse jealous of her co-star and Bart plotting sabotage. Guest starring George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After wreaking havoc in a department store, Bart is sent to a juvenile detention centre, where he meets fellow tearaway Gina - who helps him plot his escape. With the guest voice of Sarah Michelle Gellar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word 'Hope' written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons' garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isn't quite so convinced

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: A huge change in the crew rocks the boat. A flirty love triangle heats up. And chef Josh struggles to cater to some very particular vegan guests

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics' views on Britain's Got Talent, The Heat, 56 Days, Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage, Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time, BBC News (Andrew Arrested) and ITV News (Mandelson Arrested)

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: The whole house is reeling after the shock of the double elimination at the dumping ground, and some of the singletons are struggling to adjust to the changes. Jono and Tiegen go on a messy artistic date and one pair are pushed to breaking point

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons arrive at the restaurant in search of romance, including barber and football fanatic Matt, who is paired with fellow hairdresser Adele, and 23-year-old Max, who has a passion for linguistics but can never say the right thing when it comes to dating. Meanwhile, estate agent Leora is tired of being chatted up by cocky Chelsea boys and is in the market for a nice guy. Will Ben fit the bill?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: A huge change in the crew rocks the boat. A flirty love triangle heats up. And chef Josh struggles to cater to some very particular vegan guests

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: Glen meets Jack, who has one too many drunken tattoos, Sketch helps Dylan get rid of a reminder of his past. Alice meets Mhegan, whose career suffered after one night in Magaluf

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. While the race for Greg Davies' gold-plated noggin remains too close to call, some important questions will be answered in this penultimate episode. What will Babátúndé Aléshé do with a power washer? Can Andy Zaltzman shoehorn cricket into yet another task? Will Jack Dee's son make his dad proud with some crucial information? Why has Rosie Jones smeared a plate with brown stuff? And what makes Emma Sidi such an effective supervisor? Rest assured, Alex Horne is on hand to note down all the crucial details

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and Henning Wehn compete against Jon Richardson and Victoria Coren Mitchell. Tom Allen joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters with 'help' from Joe Wilkinson

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bryon Stephens, the president and chief operating officer of Marco's Pizza, dons a disguise to work incognito with his employees - from delivery drivers to managers - so that he can assess how the organisation and its many franchises are faring.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Adler, the president and chief executive of off-road accessory empire 4 Wheel Parts, goes undercover in his own firm. Within five years, he hopes to turn the company into a billion-dollar business with more than 100 stores, and he intends to make sure that it continues to provide high standards of customer service as it grows.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Things get physical between Dan and Dave when the desert heat sets tempers on edge, while Ivy plays it cool bidding on a high-risk locker

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A Santa Ana auction has the buyers hoping for a high-class score, while Jarrod and Ivy battle between buying sprees leaving the other bidders reeling

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bedfordshire, young lovebirds Gavin and Jodie kick off their competition with a romantic menu styled around their first date. Day two sees dance-loving duo Francis and Yvonne bring a taste of their international lifestyle to their menu. Finally, it's the turn of hairdresser owners Lisa and Ed to host. Francis is distraught when he finds out he will be eating lamb again and events take an eye-popping turn at dessert

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, long-time married couple Karen and Nigel kick off the competition with a Bajan menu inspired by Nigel's West Indian heritage. However, banter buddies Jo and Charlie aren't loving the Caribbean cuisine. On day two twenty-somethings Beth and Clem attempt to cook restaurant-standard food, with a celebrity twist. However, not everyone is a fan of the fine dining experience. Finally, Jo and Charlie rely on a night of Greek gastro goodies to win the £1,000 prize on offer

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: Don't Tell the Bride - Best Ever
programme.desc: Radio 1 DJ Scott Mills counts down the top 10 editions of the series, as voted for by viewers. In the running for the number one spot are a groom obsessed with sci-fi, a man who gambled on a Vegas wedding and a couple's WAG-style ceremony

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Sports-loving Brazilian Eduardo takes sole charge of organising his wedding to Polish fiance Paulina, knowing full well that if he gets any small detail wrong, she will not hold back and 'smash everything in her way'. With this in mind, he is under pressure is on to impress not only his bride-to-be but also all the guests

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Dudan, founder and CEO of environmental services company AdvantaClean, dons a disguise to work incognito among his own staff - including a project manager, a mould-removal technician and a cleaning technician - to ensure his franchise owners are following his template for success

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: John Fuller, the President and CEO of The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf, goes undercover in his own firm. Six years earlier, he did the same thing while he was CEO of 1950s diner chain Johnny Rockets. In disguise, he meets a barista, a shift supervisor and a general manager to check just how efficient his coffee shops really are

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is given just 24 hours to improve troubled American restaurants, continuing with in New Orleans with the Old Coffee Pot, a century-old bistro that used to be one of the best breakfast spots in the area. Gordon and his team brighten up the kitchen and dining area and introduce new dishes. But what will the staff think of the changes?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to the heart of Los Angeles, California, to save the Brownstone Bistro, a Caribbean fusion restaurant. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to renovate the premises with a vibrant look, create more space in the cramped kitchen and introduce a simplified menu featuring fresh and authentic Caribbean fare, working around the clock to teach the staff how to cook the dishes

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hit the Palm Springs desert hoping for some hot profits. Mary sticks to a tight budget while Darrell is willing to spend big

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hit Torrance for tough competition over only a few quality lockers. Brandi is forced to face her fears when Jarrod gets a locker sure to give her nightmares. Ivy has rarely scored in the area, so he tries a new tactic to change things up. Rene welcomes a pair of new buyers with some not so friendly competition

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from Bournemouth, Dorset, compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000 cash prize. Sue and Shaun kick things off with a Mediterranean-inspired menu. Next, competitive newlyweds Sam and Emma show off their love of surfing with a laid-back evening, and John and Livi take charge for the final party when it's all about looking good

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. It has been a particularly close series, but finally the 18th Taskmaster champion is set to be crowned by Greg Davies in this episode, the grand final. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones compete one last time, hoping for the points that will see them lift that storied golden trophy. But who will eat raw onion? Who will spot some tiny chairs? Who will punt a giant egg into the sky? And, most importantly, why is Alex Horne honking?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and Roisin Conaty compete against Jon Richardson and Nish Kumar. Adam Buxton joins the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: When Mum's best friend, Val moves in after rowing with her husband, Dad soon finds himself driven to distraction after the visitor repeatedly tidies up the house and chucks away all his old stuff. Tensions reach boiling-point when Val finds an aged tin of meat with a 'best before 1996' date that Dad has been storing in his shed. Tracy-Ann Oberman plays the unwelcome visitor in writer Robert Popper's award-winning comedy, alongside series regulars Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: It is Mum's birthday and she is having a surprise party, with the chief surprise being that she has secretly organised it herself and does not want her friends to find out, so Dad has to pretend he arranged it. Adam and Jonny take her out for a pre-party drink, before she is set to return for the 'big surprise', but Dad realises he's made a terrible mistake and told all the guests the party is for the following week

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy's mother comes to visit for a family funeral. Her son deeply resents her new boyfriend, a military man, but Mark idolises him and endures an extraordinary ordeal in a bid to win his favour. Award-winning comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark acts as roadie for Jeremy and Super Hans when they find a band manager and play at a Christian rock festival, where he learns how to have sex properly for the first time in his life. Award-winning comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: Sketch is giving noughties boy band member Ollie a musically inspired tattoo. Alice helps Jodie snap back from a bad decision, while Sketch transforms Zoe's tattoo into something more fashionable. Meanwhile, Glen gives Dave's silly shot glass a spiritual awakening, and brave Alice opts for a symbolic design

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. It has been a particularly close series, but finally the 18th Taskmaster champion is set to be crowned by Greg Davies in this episode, the grand final. Andy Zaltzman, Babátúndé Aléshé, Emma Sidi, Jack Dee and Rosie Jones compete one last time, hoping for the points that will see them lift that storied golden trophy. But who will eat raw onion? Who will spot some tiny chairs? Who will punt a giant egg into the sky? And, most importantly, why is Alex Horne honking?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and Roisin Conaty compete against Jon Richardson and Nish Kumar. Adam Buxton joins the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Ashley and Brandon Wright, the co-owners of Hamburger Mary's, go incognito in their own company, hoping to ensure that their culture of diversity and acceptance is maintained as the business expands. Ashley goes undercover to appear with drag performer Jayla at a brunch show, and Brandon works a shift with bar manager Melissa, who feels underappreciated after eight years' of hard work

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Dan Duffy, the Chief Executive of United Real Estate Group, adopts a disguise to go undercover in his own company. Dan meets many different employees to learn about their professional standards and also their personal lives.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hope auctions in the California college town of Rancho Dominguez will land them big money. Mary decides to explore her mean side, while Darrell and Brandon look for more bargains

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers struggle in Santa Ana and head to an auction in Hawaiian Gardens looking for more success. Mary tries to stay within budget and new competition arrives

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Competitive couple Mike and Lisa kick off the competition in Worcester with an Italian menu inspired by their upcoming wedding in Sorrento. However, before the food is served, the hosts overhear Steve and his outspoken wife Linda criticising the table decorations. On day two Linda and Steve cook up a tried-and-tested homemade menu, but Lisa is looking to find fault with the food. Finally, expectations are high for married couple Paul and Paul, who take a risk in search of rewards

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Sussex, Jess and her fishing fanatic partner Martin kick off the competition, hosting their first-ever dinner party. However, their overdone burgers and jelly dessert fail to impress competitive couple Peter and Lisa. On day two, Freddy and Anita's traditional Ghanaian menu proves controversial, with cow's feet and tripe too much for Peter and Lisa to swallow. On the last night, Lisa is left fuming and things get a bit awkward she and Peter and Lisa's cooking comes in for some unexpected criticism

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Dubliners Tracey and Peter have been together six years after meeting online. Tracey is the organiser, Peter is the complete opposite, a laidback scatterbrain whose only loves in life - apart from his bride-to-be - are their two-year-old son and football. Now he gets the chance to prove his worth, but it proves a rocky road to the big day, with advice from a naked stranger and a dodgy wedding veil before they get to the reception at - where else? - the sports club

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Paddy plans a wedding in a country pub car park in Offaly, but his fiancee Breda dreams of an elegant and sophisticated wedding at a country manor house

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Mike Roper, President and CEO of quick-service Tex-Mex restaurant chain Taco Bueno, disguises himself to work in secret among his own staff to gain more insight before growing the business. He works alongside general managers, a drive-through server and a supervisor at a tortilla-making plant

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: John Carona, the founder and CEO of property management company Associa, goes undercover in his own organisation to see first-hand how his employees - including a maintenance supervisor and technician, a concierge and a home inspector - are responding to recent changes at the firm

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Greenville, Mississippi, to save fine dining establishment Sherman's Restaurant, which has been a presence in the town for 30 years. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to revamp the premises, clean and renovate the kitchen and introduce a new menu featuring update versions of the restaurant's staple dishes, working around the clock to teach the staff how to prepare them

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Los Angeles, where he tries to bring family-owned Mexican restaurant La Serenata back from the brink of disaster. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to update the interior and introduce a more dynamic menu with dishes that give a fresh spin to classic Mexican cuisine. But what will the customers think of the changes?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: There's No Business Like Snow Business
programme.desc: The buyers visit Rimforrest, California where they are hit with a snow storm. Plus, Casey attempts to keep Rene focused and Ivy goes on a shopping spree

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy finds a way to lighten the mood in the hot California sun, but the bidding wars that ensue are anything but cool

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples battle it out to host the best dinner party in Newcastle. Partners Fiona and Hannah kick things off with their Moroccan-themed menu. Couple David and Sonia, and childhood sweethearts Claire and Steven, all agree the puppet show was unexpected. Day two sees Steven and Claire's German-inspired menu. Finally, David decides a charm offensive is needed for his and Sonia's night

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version of Series 19 of the comedy game show. Little Alex Horne has sculpted another impression of Taskmaster Greg Davies' regal head from pure gold in readiness for a new series. That head is the most coveted prize in television - outside of the prizes in television that offer actual cash - so the new cohort of comics who are attempting to impress Greg by completing his bafflingly pointless tasks are all pretty desperate to claim it for themselves. The five stout-hearted souls who have willingly put their reputations on the line in search of glory are Fatiha El-Ghorri, Jason Mantzoukas, Mathew Baynton, Rosie Ramsey and Stevie Martin. All of them will approach the series with hope in their hearts, but after searching for cheese phones, dressing mannequins in wetsuits and striking powerful poses, four of them will exit broken and beaten, while only one will dance away pretending to be humble in the face of their truly incredible victory (while probably still feeling quite broken and beaten). In the first episode of the series, with his simpering secretary Alex Horne in tow, Taskmaster Greg Davies beckons a fresh quintet of quivering comics into his world of misrule. Their success in this series opener will rest on their skills in tasks involving vinegar, raisins and, as is traditional, peas

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and David O'Doherty compete against Jon Richardson and Natasia Demetriou. John Kearns joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: While clearing up the loft, Dad finds his old, terrifying-looking ventriloquist dummy Lord Luck. Mum is horrified to see it again, but her spouse is in his element and can't stop playing with Lord Luck. Unfortunately Dad is a terrible ventriloquist, and it seems that Lord Luck only knows two words - ones not to be repeated in polite company. Meanwhile, Jonny's friend, Ben is coming for dinner. He's recently been dumped by his fiancee and is in need of cheering up. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam brings his old violin back home, and as a special family treat Mum makes him agree to play the instrument for Grandma, who has been invited round for dinner. However, Adam is not at all happy at the prospect as he hasn't played seriously for some 12 years and has always hated playing the violin anyway. An amused Jonny relishes every moment of discomfort as he watches on from the sidelines. Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter and Frances Cuka star in Robert Popper's award-winning comedy

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark has a go at online gaming and live role-play with Dobby, and wonders whether she may be the one for him. He and Sophie sort out their annulment, while Jeremy joins a cult. Award-winning comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark and Jeremy enjoy their final days of freedom before Sophie's baby is born, determined to ignore the fact that one of them is the father. Mark makes the most of his extra wealth and power after being promoted, spending money on the flat, trying to get Jeremy a job, and pursuing company IT girl Dobby - but his plans go awry during a routine fire drill. Starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea are joined in their quest to uncover the nation's most popular talking points by First Dates' Fred Sirieix, actor Thomas Turgoose and comedians Sara Pascoe and Desiree Burch. Jimmy Carr hosts

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. Team captains Rob Beckett and Aisling Bea are joined by Melanie C, Jessica Knappett, Joe Wilkinson and Tom Allen. They answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Sparks are flying as two guys clash over the same girl. Two more naked newbies get a baptism of fire with a tandem bike ride and while one couple's connection goes from strength to strength, doubts are cast about another relationship

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on a selection of the week's TV, with cameras capturing their lively discussions as they sit down to watch the coronation ceremony and concert, The 1% Club, The Greatest Auction, Made in Chelsea and the local elections results on BBC News

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pops is evicted after accidentally starting a fire in his flat during a Halloween party. Beverly invites him to move into the family home, but soon his wild lifestyle proves too much for them to handle. Comedy, starring George Segal

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. Soon after, Murray and Adam see Meller in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back for him. Meanwhile, Barry can't accept that Erica is better than him at a new board game - Trivial Pursuit

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2018, groom Lee hedged his bets on a wedding in a maze for bride Becky. Now, the pair are back - along with best man Shane and bridesmaid Lisa - to discuss their big day

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Claire and Haley fall ill at the same time, Phil wages battle against a defective smoke detector after concluding it is saying 'you're not a man' to him. Elsewhere, Manny accidentally gets one of Jay's employees dismissed. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Manny's birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engaged duo Tony and Ami kick off the competition in East Sussex with an evening of raucous fun, but foodies Chris and Charlene are baffled by the cultural references, and Polish pair Izabella and Michal are left tired from chewing on Ami's rock-solid banoffee pies. Day two sees an international-themed menu being served up, while a menu of hearty cuisine and obscure meats are prepared on the final night

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is incensed that an anonymous and rude parent robbed him of a precious moment with Lily during her recent dance recital and goes to extremes to uncover her identity and give her a peace of his mind. Meanwhile, Jay, Claire and Mitch attend a family wedding and unexpectedly run into Dede at the reception, and Phil and Gloria are on a college tour with Luke and Manny

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay shows a bit of favouritism when he and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness, while Cam and Mitch try to get Lily, Haley and Sal to stand up to the men in their lives, but things don't turn out as planned

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Feeling empowered after his successful DIY project, Phil convinces Jay to invest in a property that he's always wanted to develop. Meanwhile, Claire's newfound love of cooking Sunday dinners hasn't been as successful as she thinks

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria gives Claire a birthday experience she will find it hard to forget, while a childhood trauma haunts Cam when he winds up in hospital

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge posts a humorous photo online of Homer eating an ice-cream outside the nuclear plant, prompting Mr Burns to fire him, while a female coder decides to make Lisa her protegee. With the guest voices of Stephen Merchant and Kaitlin Olson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer decides to buy a healthier brand of milk, but Apu persuades him to buy a cheaper sort made by Buzz Cola that is full of hormones, while Bart realises he has a crush on his new teacher Mrs Berrera. With the guest voice of Sofía Vergara (Modern Family)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sanjay's son turns the Kwik-E-Mart into a health-food store against Apu's insistence on tradition. Bart renounces his devotion to pranks after his mischief has unforeseen consequences, but is called upon to return to his wicked ways and take down the new enterprise

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Professor Frink plays matchmaker when he creates an algorithm to make the lonely people of Springfield fall in love. When Marge, Bart, and Lisa visit Grampa for Valentine's Day, they find the old folks in a drug-induced hallucination that lets them relive happy memories

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are so disappointed by the latest Cosmic Wars film that they decide to visit creator Randall Curtis at his ranch in California. Meanwhile, Homer and Marge visit a vineyard - a jaunt that ends with a drunken Homer crashing the car and letting Marge face the consequences

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob boss's place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and bosun Nathan have quite the dilemma on their hands with two hapless deckhands. And a demanding guest wants to go for a risky late-night swim

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Great British Bake Off, Strictly Come Dancing, Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins, Sex Education, Blankety Blank, Celebrity Race Across the World, Love & Death, and Ambulance

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Big Brother: The Launch, Don't Look Down for SU2C, Antiques Roadshow, Coronation Street, Big Little Journeys, Beat the Chasers Celebrity Special and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg. From October 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. Six-foot pansexual opera singer Clare is looking for a man as tall as she is, while Jessica, who has a disastrous dating history, hopes to bring out her naughty side

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: The whole house is reeling after the shock of the double elimination at the dumping ground, and some of the singletons are struggling to adjust to the changes. Jono and Tiegen go on a messy artistic date and one pair are pushed to breaking point

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Great British Bake Off, Strictly Come Dancing, Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins, Sex Education, Blankety Blank, Celebrity Race Across the World, Love & Death, and Ambulance

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and bosun Nathan have quite the dilemma on their hands with two hapless deckhands. And a demanding guest wants to go for a risky late-night swim

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly challenges Erica to participate in Jazzercise after she claims her mother's obsession is 'sad'. However, when she wins the bet, Erica opts out of celebrating Thanksgiving so Beverly has to find a way to win her daughter back to the celebrations. Uncle Marvin visits and unexpectedly bonds with Adam. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. Meanwhile, Beverly fears she's being replaced in the kitchen when the family falls in love with the new Chinese restaurant in town. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with Craig and Sofia, who reflect on their Oktoberfest-themed wedding with the bride's best friend James and the groom's sister Emma

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted when his mother comes to visit, but her presence makes Mitchell feel uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Haley's decision to break up with Dylan hits Phil hard. Guest starring Celia Weston, with Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples in Essex and east London compete in the dinner-party challenge, beginning with Spencer and Sara's simple Jewish feast. Reserved pair Lauren and Jack prepare a sophisticated menu reflecting the hosts' heritage in South Africa and Burma. For the final dinner, Paul and Ed opt for a flavourful fare that proves a bit much for those with a fondness for plainer food, and with the contest over, the competitors anxiously wait to discover which party was considered the best

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and bosun Nathan have quite the dilemma on their hands with two hapless deckhands. And a demanding guest wants to go for a risky late-night swim

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A small lie spirals out of control for Phil when he tries to hide the fact he has an attractive new client from Claire, who is keeps her handsome yoga teacher. Elsewhere, Jay becomes obsessed with tracking down a troll who's been leaving nasty comments about his web show, and Mitch and Cam try to teach a nervous Lily to ride a bicycle

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron's emotional sister Pam proves too much for Mitchell when she comes to visit, while Phil and Claire struggle to stay awake during a spontaneous trip to Paris. Jay's bathroom remodeling project frustrates Gloria, and Andy has a wild night out in Las Vegas with Haley

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The proud residents of Springfield are outraged when they learn their town anthem was stolen from a travelling musician, so Bart and Lisa volunteer to find a replacement song. Meanwhile, Homer is on a mission to find a fat people's rights group after a humiliating incident in which he gets stuck in his seat. With the guest voice of Pharrell Williams

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is told to entertain a visiting Nigerian princess whose father is in town for a business meeting with Mr Burns, but when she proves uninterested in the TV, he takes her to Moe's, where she and the normally irascible barman strike a surprisingly sweet friendship. With the guest voices of Jon Lovitz and Richard Branson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum gets his hands on a military jet pack, only to cause insurmountable damage to the local church. To make matters worse, Marge and the rest of the congregation are short of funds to repair their beloved place of worship - so they resort to gambling to raise the necessary funds

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is convinced Bart is lying when he denies any responsibility for a bulldozer crash, so she doggedly follows her mischief-making son's every step in the hope he will eventually crumble and confess. Meanwhile, it's a case of out with the old and in with the new when Homer gives Santa's Little Helper the cold shoulder in favour of Flanders' new pooch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: As the wedding of Gina's mother and Boyle's father arrives, each member of the squad is given a task to complete for the big day. However, Peralta and Santiago get sidetracked chasing a criminal, and Jeffords struggles to officiate at the ceremony. Comedy, guest starring Sandra Bernhard and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's seldom-seen father Roger arrives to spend some time with his son, but Charles is sceptical of his true motives. Meanwhile, Holt tests Amy, Terry, Gina and Rosa with a near-impossible brain teaser in exchange for tickets to a Beyonce concert. Guest starring Bradley Whitford (The West Wing)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: An online video sets Cam on a quest to restore Fizbo's good name, while Phil is in for a surprise when he meets his future stepbrother and Manny enlists Gloria, Claire and Haley for a read-through of his new play

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil gets ready to play in a charity basketball match, but NBA stars Charles Barkley and DeAndre Jordan show up and the pressure gets too much for him

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: During a quick workout session in the garage, Mitchell accidentally knocks over an urn filled with the ashes of Cam's beloved pet pig Lilly and quickly attempts to cover up his blunder. Hoping to catch Mitchell in a lie, Cam makes up a tall tale to trap him, but his own web of deceit soon becomes a little too big to manage

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam have five minutes to catch a flight while fighting the effects of sleeping pills they took prematurely, while Haley and Rainer are forced to re-evaluate their entire relationship in the five minutes before a birthday cake arrives. Phil and Claire pay a surprise visit to Alex and are given a surprise introduction to her new boyfriend

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa get to know a homeless folk singer named Hettie, after Bart accidentally loses the shopping trolley containing her possessions and invites her to stay in his bedroom wardrobe. Meanwhile, Homer's attempt at DIY traps the cat in the walls of the house, so he launches a rescue bid

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is inspired to become a veterinarian and begins an internship at the local vet's surgery, but she learns a tough lesson when the school's neglected hamster dies. Marge gets a job as a crime-scene cleaner, but is traumatised by the gory sights. Michael York guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is distressed when Lisa signs up for the opportunity to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, but a cunning strategy using reverse psychology to discourage her daughter from carrying out her plan goes badly awry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find a devastated Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Lisa gets a leading role in the school production of Casablanca, leaving Milhouse jealous of her co-star and Bart plotting sabotage. Guest starring George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After wreaking havoc in a department store, Bart is sent to a juvenile detention centre, where he meets fellow tearaway Gina - who helps him plot his escape. With the guest voice of Sarah Michelle Gellar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word 'Hope' written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons' garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isn't quite so convinced

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: A huge change in the crew rocks the boat. A flirty love triangle heats up. And chef Josh struggles to cater to some very particular vegan guests

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A professional dancer from London seeks a man who can pop some moves on the dance floor and also help him lose his virginity. Second up is a shy rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons arrive at the restaurant in search of romance, including barber and football fanatic Matt, who is paired with fellow hairdresser Adele, and 23-year-old Max, who has a passion for linguistics but can never say the right thing when it comes to dating. Meanwhile, estate agent Leora is tired of being chatted up by cocky Chelsea boys and is in the market for a nice guy. Will Ben fit the bill?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons arrive at the restaurant in search of romance, including barber and football fanatic Matt, who is paired with fellow hairdresser Adele, and 23-year-old Max, who has a passion for linguistics but can never say the right thing when it comes to dating. Meanwhile, estate agent Leora is tired of being chatted up by cocky Chelsea boys and is in the market for a nice guy. Will Ben fit the bill?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: A huge change in the crew rocks the boat. A flirty love triangle heats up. And chef Josh struggles to cater to some very particular vegan guests

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with Jenna and Nathan, who worried he had made a huge mistake by planning a Mexican Day of the Dead wedding

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Sparks are flying as two guys clash over the same girl. Two more naked newbies get a baptism of fire with a tandem bike ride and while one couple's connection goes from strength to strength, doubts are cast about another relationship

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on a selection of the week's TV, with cameras capturing their lively discussions as they sit down to watch the coronation ceremony and concert, The 1% Club, The Greatest Auction, Made in Chelsea and the local elections results on BBC News

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pops is evicted after accidentally starting a fire in his flat during a Halloween party. Beverly invites him to move into the family home, but soon his wild lifestyle proves too much for them to handle. Comedy, starring George Segal

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. Soon after, Murray and Adam see Meller in a new light, so Beverly tries to get his job back for him. Meanwhile, Barry can't accept that Erica is better than him at a new board game - Trivial Pursuit

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: In 2018, groom Lee hedged his bets on a wedding in a maze for bride Becky. Now, the pair are back - along with best man Shane and bridesmaid Lisa - to discuss their big day

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While Claire and Haley fall ill at the same time, Phil wages battle against a defective smoke detector after concluding it is saying 'you're not a man' to him. Elsewhere, Manny accidentally gets one of Jay's employees dismissed. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Manny's birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Engaged duo Tony and Ami kick off the competition in East Sussex with an evening of raucous fun, but foodies Chris and Charlene are baffled by the cultural references, and Polish pair Izabella and Michal are left tired from chewing on Ami's rock-solid banoffee pies. Day two sees an international-themed menu being served up, while a menu of hearty cuisine and obscure meats are prepared on the final night

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Wealthy socialites have the crew rushed off their feet, and major mistakes keep plaguing the deck team - including a deckhand floating out to sea on a jet ski

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is incensed that an anonymous and rude parent robbed him of a precious moment with Lily during her recent dance recital and goes to extremes to uncover her identity and give her a peace of his mind. Meanwhile, Jay, Claire and Mitch attend a family wedding and unexpectedly run into Dede at the reception, and Phil and Gloria are on a college tour with Luke and Manny

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay shows a bit of favouritism when he and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness, while Cam and Mitch try to get Lily, Haley and Sal to stand up to the men in their lives, but things don't turn out as planned

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Feeling empowered after his successful DIY project, Phil convinces Jay to invest in a property that he's always wanted to develop. Meanwhile, Claire's newfound love of cooking Sunday dinners hasn't been as successful as she thinks

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria gives Claire a birthday experience she will find it hard to forget, while a childhood trauma haunts Cam when he winds up in hospital

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge posts a humorous photo online of Homer eating an ice-cream outside the nuclear plant, prompting Mr Burns to fire him, while a female coder decides to make Lisa her protegee. With the guest voices of Stephen Merchant and Kaitlin Olson

programme.desc: Chief Wiggum gets his hands on a military jet pack, only to cause insurmountable damage to the local church. To make matters worse, Marge and the rest of the congregation are short of funds to repair their beloved place of worship - so they resort to gambling to raise the necessary funds

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is convinced Bart is lying when he denies any responsibility for a bulldozer crash, so she doggedly follows her mischief-making son's every step in the hope he will eventually crumble and confess. Meanwhile, it's a case of out with the old and in with the new when Homer gives Santa's Little Helper the cold shoulder in favour of Flanders' new pooch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: As the wedding of Gina's mother and Boyle's father arrives, each member of the squad is given a task to complete for the big day. However, Peralta and Santiago get sidetracked chasing a criminal, and Jeffords struggles to officiate at the ceremony. Comedy, guest starring Sandra Bernhard and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's seldom-seen father Roger arrives to spend some time with his son, but Charles is sceptical of his true motives. Meanwhile, Holt tests Amy, Terry, Gina and Rosa with a near-impossible brain teaser in exchange for tickets to a Beyonce concert. Guest starring Bradley Whitford (The West Wing)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: An online video sets Cam on a quest to restore Fizbo's good name, while Phil is in for a surprise when he meets his future stepbrother and Manny enlists Gloria, Claire and Haley for a read-through of his new play

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil gets ready to play in a charity basketball match, but NBA stars Charles Barkley and DeAndre Jordan show up and the pressure gets too much for him

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: During a quick workout session in the garage, Mitchell accidentally knocks over an urn filled with the ashes of Cam's beloved pet pig Lilly and quickly attempts to cover up his blunder. Hoping to catch Mitchell in a lie, Cam makes up a tall tale to trap him, but his own web of deceit soon becomes a little too big to manage

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam have five minutes to catch a flight while fighting the effects of sleeping pills they took prematurely, while Haley and Rainer are forced to re-evaluate their entire relationship in the five minutes before a birthday cake arrives. Phil and Claire pay a surprise visit to Alex and are given a surprise introduction to her new boyfriend

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa get to know a homeless folk singer named Hettie, after Bart accidentally loses the shopping trolley containing her possessions and invites her to stay in his bedroom wardrobe. Meanwhile, Homer's attempt at DIY traps the cat in the walls of the house, so he launches a rescue bid

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is inspired to become a veterinarian and begins an internship at the local vet's surgery, but she learns a tough lesson when the school's neglected hamster dies. Marge gets a job as a crime-scene cleaner, but is traumatised by the gory sights. Michael York guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is distressed when Lisa signs up for the opportunity to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, but a cunning strategy using reverse psychology to discourage her daughter from carrying out her plan goes badly awry

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find a devastated Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Lisa gets a leading role in the school production of Casablanca, leaving Milhouse jealous of her co-star and Bart plotting sabotage. Guest starring George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After wreaking havoc in a department store, Bart is sent to a juvenile detention centre, where he meets fellow tearaway Gina - who helps him plot his escape. With the guest voice of Sarah Michelle Gellar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word 'Hope' written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons' garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isn't quite so convinced

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: A huge change in the crew rocks the boat. A flirty love triangle heats up. And chef Josh struggles to cater to some very particular vegan guests

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A professional dancer from London seeks a man who can pop some moves on the dance floor and also help him lose his virginity. Second up is a shy rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: First Dates

Meanwhile, estate agent Leora is tired of being chatted up by cocky Chelsea boys and is in the market for a nice guy. Will Ben fit the bill?

programme.title: Classic Mary Berry
programme.desc: The food writer demonstrates a range of recipes to tempt family and friends, featuring classics, simple British dishes and modern favourites. programme.title: Classic Mary Berry
programme.desc: The food writer demonstrates a simple version of a classic kedgeree, as well as breakfast drop scones, a chicken, avocado and bacon salad, and easy beefburgers. She also takes inspiration from a visit to a groundbreaking primary school in south London that has built a secret garden where staff teach their students how to grow vegetables and look after a brood of chickens, and Mary joins two enthusiastic and skilful Year 5 pupils in the teaching kitchen to make something deliciously fresh for their school lunch

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: They came, they saw, they baked - and along the way nine of them were eliminated from the competition. Now only three amateur bakers remain to compete in the final. After a bit of shopping, James pitches up his mobile kitchen overlooking the iconic Clifton Suspension Bridge to make a tagine of lamb chops. programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: The chef's countrywide tour brings him to Exmouth in Devon and a rendezvous with Michael Caines, the owner of Lympstone Manor, a country house hotel and restaurant with stunning views over the River Exe. James also visits a local vegetable farmer - and cannot resist the chance to drive his tractor - and gathers mussels with fisherman Myles Blood Smyth

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers
programme.desc: A case in which the father of two youngsters married wealthy family friend Marjorie Congdon. Shortly afterwards, children Nancy and Tom found themselves caught up in their new stepmother's bizarre life of crime

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers
programme.desc: The case of former exotic dancer Debra Hartmann, who craved a life of luxury and seemed to have it all - a rich husband, fur coats and expensive car. However, she colluded with lover John Korabik to kill her husband Werner, who was shot dead in June 1982

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts as five colleagues who work for the police take part, answering questions about top 10 lists, then trying to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home prize money of up to £125,000

programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Ranvir Singh in which Peter and Aaron, Tina and Jessica and Nish and Sanjay take on Riddlemaster Henry Lewis. programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve is furious when his protests are ignored and Barney Miller, the seven million dollar man who experienced a nervous breakdown, is reactivated. It is soon clear the bionic basket-case is not firing on all cylinders when he injures a race-car owner and embarks on a life of crime. Can Steve track him down and put a stop to his misdeeds?

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: Londo's career is placed in jeopardy when an exotic dancer seduces him and steals his secret files. Meanwhile, Garibaldi investigates the unauthorised use of a restricted channel of communication

programme.title: American Made (2017)
programme.desc: A pilot is recruited to act as a courier for the CIA in the 1980s, carrying out covert deliveries from the US to General Noriega's regime in Panama. However, he exploits the opportunity to set up a profitable sideline trafficking drugs for a cartel. His dangerous double life takes a darker turn when he is ordered to supply weapons to far-right rebel groups operating in Nicaragua. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Tom Cruise and Domhnall Gleeson

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: The bandana-wearing one-man army has turned his back on violence to live a quiet life in Thailand. But before long he takes up arms once again to rescue a party of missionaries who have been taken captive en route to Burma by a sadistic military officer. Action sequel, directed by and starring Sylvester Stallone. With Julie Benz and Graham McTavish

programme.title: In the Line of Duty (2019)
programme.desc: A disgraced cop must race against time to save a police chief's daughter from an unhinged suspect as a citizen journalist livestreams his pursuit. Crime thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart and Courtney Eaton

programme.title: Beyond Suspicion (2018)
programme.desc: On his release from a prison sentence for crimes of which he was innocent, a shamed former cop connects a murder case to a government conspiracy involving rogue agents from a top spy agency. Crime thriller, starring Karl Urban, Sofia Vergara and Andy Garcia.

programme.desc: A burnt-out British spy is ordered to venture undercover in East Germany. He begins by faking his resignation and subsequent alcoholic depression to dupe the enemy into trusting him, but, as he becomes further embroiled in his mission, he comes to realise that he is merely a pawn. Espionage thriller, based on John Le Carre's novel, starring Richard Burton, Claire Bloom, Oskar Werner and Peter Van Eyck

programme.desc: The search for a missing Federation historian leads Kirk to a planet ruled by a Nazi-like dictatorship. Classic sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.desc: A retired American colonel, frustrated by a decade of wading through red tape, takes the law into his own hands and recruits an elite team of Vietnam veterans to rescue his son from a PoW camp in Laos. Action adventure, starring Gene Hackman, Patrick Swayze, Robert Stack and Fred Ward

programme.title: Man on Fire (1987)
programme.desc: Ex-CIA operative Scott Glenn goes on a gun-toting rampage to rescue the kidnapped 12-year-old he was hired to protect in Italy. Thriller, co-starring Joe Pesci, Danny Aiello, Brooke Adams, Jonathan Pryce and Jade Malle. The film was remade in 2004 with Denzel Washington dishing out the necessary rough justice

programme.title: Lionheart (1991)
programme.desc: An ex-soldier supports the family of his murdered brother by winning underground street fights - but one fight proves tougher than the rest. Action, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: Momentum (2015)
programme.desc: A retired thief is persuaded to carry out one last diamond heist by her former partner, only to get mixed up in a murder. With a ruthless assassin on her trail, she must unmask the secret conspiracy that has manipulated her into the line of fire. Action thriller, starring Olga Kurylenko, Morgan Freeman and James Purefoy

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. A man experiencing dizzy spells is accompanied on a trip to St George's by his granddaughter, who shares her memories of how he filled a gap in her life after her father died

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A woman at the airport suffers a suspected miscarriage, but the paramedics sent to her aid have trouble getting her back to hospital due to heavy snowfall. Crews also battle through the roads to treat a woman semi-conscious in police custody with collapsed veins

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is rushed to St George's after being knocked off her bike at a pedestrian crossing, while in Paediatrics, a 12-year-old suffers a wound in his groin after falling from a tree and impaling his leg. An 85-year-old woman brought into urgent care after a fall at home relates her experiences of being evacuated during the Second World War

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 63-year-old builder falls from a great height while working on a construction site, and his daughter shares her stories of the sacrifices he made for her. Doctors fear a teenager who has been hit by a car may have sustained brain injuries, while a man who collapsed while playing golf talks about his unconventional upbringing in Kenya and how he had to adapt to fulfill his dreams

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped

Kate Quilton visits Kenya to find out how many mangoes are in a snack pack, Helen Lawal learns the mystery of the fluffy centre of a snowball, John Whaite cracks open the secret of caramel popcorn, and Andi Oliver investigates what a supermarket aisle means when you're shopping online

programme.title: Heir Hunters

Plus, details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Four in a Bed
