The hosts take their visitors on a tram ride along the seafront and on to Madame Tussauds, but there are complaints about uncomfortable mattresses and disappointing views and the next day's breakfast fails to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and air their grievances. Watersedge hosts Alan and Sylvie start the proceedings, but confront the guests who complained about their room having no en-suite facilities, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in Essex and Suffolk, where the first host, 29-year-old entrepreneur Chris, plans to treat his guests - Samantha, Joanna, Mark and Claire - to a night of fine French cuisine, with the added bonus of ripped abs on display

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night from Essex/Suffolk, and it is the turn of salon owner Sam to cook. She has opted for a good looking, simple menu, but foodie Chris is not impressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Claire hosts the third night of the contest in Essex, and lays on a lavish East End-themed feast, but Sam may be looking for vengeance after everyone claimed her food was boring

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Essex sees Polish party girl Joanna offer a taste of her homeland in a bid to win the prize. But some of the unusual flavour combinations throw her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Essex and Suffolk, ex-policeman Mark wants to surprise his guests with some homemade favourites. Meanwhile, will there be wedding bells or tears when Chris answers Joanna's earlier proposition?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Cliff House Hotel in Southbourne, where owner Rich Norris and chef Matt Head hope that their swish decor and top-notch breakfast will give them the edge. Guests Hannah and Ibrahim are blown away by their bathroom, but Paul and Dave end up feeling a little exposed. At dinner, a revelation about Ibrahim's high-flying corporate career raises eyebrows, while the hosts' culinary credentials raise eggs-pectations for the morning. At breakfast, Stuart and Fiona discover some fishy goings-on, before Hannah's verdict on the food leaves Rich and Matt feeling scrambled

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second venue of the week is the Hotel Barge Waternimf in Ely, Cambridgeshire, which has an open plan kitchen leaving the hosts exposed to everything the guests have to say

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Montpellier Hotel in Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where Hannah Henewaa and Ibrahim Sani hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Paul Wright and Dave McDermott welcome their rivals to the Coach and Horses in West Sussex, where one guest has a bad night's sleep and the fry-up falls flat for some of the others

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees the B&Bers take each other to task on everything from insufficient slumber to hopeless hosting, before the payments are revealed and we find out who's won

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer offer their expert advice to more potential homeowners. In Oxfordshire, first-time buyer Tim hopes Kirstie can put an end to his two-year search for a flat, while globetrotting couple Phil and Louise have decided to settle in Gloucestershire with their baby daughter Annabelle, enlisting Phil's help to find a suitable property

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce presents a TV version of his famous mid-morning radio quiz, in which players compete to impress with their knowledge of popular music from the 1950s to the present day. Here, singer Toyah Willcox, actor and rapper Richard Blackwood, actress Sally Lindsay, radio DJ and presenter MistaJam and Pussycat Doll Kimberly Wyatt battle it out for victory

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Listed Britain
programme.desc: Kevin explores places created by people who followed an obsession further than most would dare, and discovers how this singular passion can become something everyone else wants to protect. He climbs the Lovell Telescope at Jodrell Bank, and helps to repair the protected dinosaur sculptures at Crystal Palace Park that captured a Victorian idea of pre-history

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life-threatening abdominal aortic aneurysm. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Cameras also follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel, who arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager is rushed to hospital with a lacerated wrist after putting his hand through a pane of glass, an incident which leaves his father reflecting on his family history. Another patient discusses being diagnosed with a chronic condition that causes constant stomach pain, and a 76-year-old woman suffers severe shortness of breath and a tight chest

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Listed Britain
programme.desc: Kevin explores places created by people who followed an obsession further than most would dare, and discovers how this singular passion can become something everyone else wants to protect. He climbs the Lovell Telescope at Jodrell Bank, and helps to repair the protected dinosaur sculptures at Crystal Palace Park that captured a Victorian idea of pre-history

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A patient is brought in having broken his leg playing American football, while a resident at a neurological hospital is examined for signs that he has suffered a stroke. A man experiencing dizzy spells is accompanied on a trip to St George's by his granddaughter, who shares her memories of how he filled a gap in her life after her father died

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: In search of the secret to the bubbles in bubble tea, Kate Quilton visits a cassava farm in Kenya to get to the root of it. Jimmy Doherty is in Somerset exploring why sour milk is sneered at, though soured cream is revered. Plus, Helen Lawal reports from Portugal on canned fish

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate detectives are on the road in Southampton as they try to track down multiple beneficiaries to the estate of a local market trader worth more than £100,000. Meanwhile, another firm's investigation reveals a family's historical links to the beginnings of professional sport

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Norfolk, where items include an old pedal cycle with a two-stroke engine attached and a side table made from a military shell case

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B competition heads to France as four British expats compete, beginning with Lisanne Ashton, who runs the rural Les Chimeres in the south of the country. After searching for truffles in the surrounding area, guest Tony Horton's passion for the royal family causes him to clash with fellow competitor Shaun Baggs, whose mood is worsened by the discovery of bugs in his bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition continues at Le Manoir in the Dordogne, owned by royalist Tony Horton and his Armenian wife Shou Shou - who make a poor first impression by presenting guests with a timetable specifying when they are allowed to use the bathroom. A vinegar-tasting session also receives a tepid response, and some of the visitors are bemused by their hosts turning up for breakfast in costume

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wine-loving Shaun Baggs and his partner Patrick Weaver bring the contest to Le Clos Rabelais in central France, where they invite fellow competitors to take part in a traditional French dance class. Tension mounts as George and Linda become increasingly frustrated with Lisanne, and the bickering continues over dinner when Shaun is confronted about his previous negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: George and Linda McGill welcome their guests to the Moulin de la Civiere near Rostrenen in Brittany, where entertainment comes in the shape of a tenpin-bowling outing, and the couple lay on a full English breakfast. However, the hosts receive an unexpected surprise at feedback time courtesy of Lisanne

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, the first host is 37-year-old Canadian comedian Larah, who hopes to bag herself the prize with a night of fine dining. She aims to impress 38-year-old pilot James, 37-year-old cafe owner Nutan, 26-year-old salesman Sindiso and 42-year-old security manager Anne

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night from the competition in Edinburgh, and cafe owner Nutan is hoping her happy-go-lucky attitude will have her laughing all the way to the bank

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Edinburgh is South-African born family man Sindiso, who hopes an evening of fun inspired by his homeland will win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Edinburgh security company manager Anne hopes her homely, relaxed night in will be enough to win the £1,000 prize - but rising tensions between the guests may scupper her chances

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final night in Edinburgh, and pilot James is hoping a touch of sophistication in his high-flying menu will see him land safely in first place. However, after the previous night's tension, his main concern is keeping any potential explosions contained. Guests Anne and Larah have a suspicion he could be serious competition. Will James manage to produce excellent food and keep the peace, leading him to victory?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week comes from Jockhedge Holiday Cottages in Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, where owner Karen Cumberlidge and her son Liam hope to wow their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Victoria Inn in Witton-le-Wear, County Durham, where someone gets locked in a bathroom and bed springs leave one couple facing a battle

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week, husband and wife Aidan and Mij Nattrass welcome their rivals to the Earlston House Hotel in Paignton, Devon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Beach House in Portland, Dorset, where Pete Lacey feels his back-to-basics approach offers his guests good value. But things get heated with the radiator in Karen and Liam's room and opinions are laid bare over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores. Karen and Liam are shocked by their payment from Pete, while Carolynne and George want to find out what caused Karen and Liam to lose sleep at their place

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Northern Ireland, with Phil searching for properties in Bangor that would be suitable for Lynn, a woman who has been blind since birth. Meanwhile, Kirstie is in Belfast helping a couple of busy doctors who hope to find a home together before they tie the knot

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the second of two celebrity editions of the music quiz, featuring broadcaster Nikki Fox, choirmaster and presenter Gareth Malone, TV presenter Jean Johansson, comedian Nish Kumar and pop star Claire Richards

programme.title: The Sommerdahl Murders
programme.desc: Fourth season of the Danish crime drama. Dan is coming to terms with the break-up of his marriage and awaiting the birth of his grandchild. When the owner of a winery is found dead, he and Flemming must try to make sense of a tangled tale where suspects include the victim's ex-husband and his smooth-talking sister, and plenty of other people whose stories don't add up. In Danish

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics Jan Vann and Chelsie Kennedy rush to a road traffic collision, but find the driver of the car has left the vehicle and doesn't want to be treated by the crew. The police suspect he may have been drinking, but the crew need to convince him to receive their help. In Coventry, paramedics Neil and Laura rush to a two-year-old boy who is having a severe allergic reaction

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 52-year-old cyclist is rushed in to St George's Hospital in Tooting after being hit by a car, while a 92-year-old former Baptist minister is admitted after a fall while out walking. Meanwhile, a painter and decorator has suffered a wrist injury that is proving challenging to diagnose

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to save a 27-year-old diabetic woman who's trapped in a three-car pile-up on the M6. In Coventry, paramedics Neil Vann and Laura Perkins are called to an 82-year-old man with severe breathing problems, who is on the point of death and has left a note asking not to be resuscitated. Meanwhile in Birmingham, a crew rushes to save a man with a history of heart attacks who is suffering chest pains at work

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager is rushed to hospital with a lacerated wrist after putting his hand through a pane of glass, an incident which leaves his father reflecting on his family history. programme.desc: It is the second night from the competition in Edinburgh, and cafe owner Nutan is hoping her happy-go-lucky attitude will have her laughing all the way to the bank

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Edinburgh is South-African born family man Sindiso, who hopes an evening of fun inspired by his homeland will win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Edinburgh security company manager Anne hopes her homely, relaxed night in will be enough to win the £1,000 prize - but rising tensions between the guests may scupper her chances

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final night in Edinburgh, and pilot James is hoping a touch of sophistication in his high-flying menu will see him land safely in first place. However, after the previous night's tension, his main concern is keeping any potential explosions contained. Guests Anne and Larah have a suspicion he could be serious competition. Will James manage to produce excellent food and keep the peace, leading him to victory?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week comes from Jockhedge Holiday Cottages in Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, where owner Karen Cumberlidge and her son Liam hope to wow their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Victoria Inn in Witton-le-Wear, County Durham, where someone gets locked in a bathroom and bed springs leave one couple facing a battle

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week, husband and wife Aidan and Mij Nattrass welcome their rivals to the Earlston House Hotel in Paignton, Devon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Beach House in Portland, Dorset, where Pete Lacey feels his back-to-basics approach offers his guests good value. But things get heated with the radiator in Karen and Liam's room and opinions are laid bare over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores. Karen and Liam are shocked by their payment from Pete, while Carolynne and George want to find out what caused Karen and Liam to lose sleep at their place

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Northern Ireland, with Phil searching for properties in Bangor that would be suitable for Lynn, a woman who has been blind since birth. Meanwhile, Kirstie is in Belfast helping a couple of busy doctors who hope to find a home together before they tie the knot

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the second of two celebrity editions of the music quiz, featuring broadcaster Nikki Fox, choirmaster and presenter Gareth Malone, TV presenter Jean Johansson, comedian Nish Kumar and pop star Claire Richards

programme.title: The Sommerdahl Murders
programme.desc: Fourth season of the Danish crime drama. Dan is coming to terms with the break-up of his marriage and awaiting the birth of his grandchild. When the owner of a winery is found dead, he and Flemming must try to make sense of a tangled tale where suspects include the victim's ex-husband and his smooth-talking sister, and plenty of other people whose stories don't add up. In Danish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager is rushed to hospital with a lacerated wrist after putting his hand through a pane of glass, an incident which leaves his father reflecting on his family history. Another patient discusses being diagnosed with a chronic condition that causes constant stomach pain, and a 76-year-old woman suffers severe shortness of breath and a tight chest

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, paramedics Adi Ahmed and Mark McDonagh rush to a 10-year-old boy who has had a major epileptic fit. At the same time in Coventry, an elderly woman with heart and lung failure is struggling to breathe but refuses to go to hospital for treatment. Plus, in Warwick, a crew is called to an elderly man who has extreme anxiety and has called emergency services 14 times

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to save a 27-year-old diabetic woman who's trapped in a three-car pile-up on the M6. programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: Islands of the Forth: Fortress Islands of the Forth
programme.desc: Paul Murton continues his island-hopping odyssey, exploring the islands scattered in the Firth of Forth. He discovers these seemingly peaceful islands have a dramatic history of warfare, from medieval English raids on Inchcolm to the first air-raid attack on Britain above Inchgarvie. Paul learns about the strategic importance of Inchkeith's defences during two world wars before heading to the Bass Rock to learn more about the history of prisoners incarcerated on the island, with 160,000 gannets for company

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians take a trip on the Flying Scotsman, arguably the most famous locomotive in the world, along its original route connecting London and Edinburgh - the two most important financial capitals of the Empire. Peter Ginn explores how the railways revolutionised the delivery of mail across Britain, he and Alex Langlands learn about the first electronic communication service - more than 100 years before the arrival of email - and Ruth finds out about the role of the wheeltapper. Plus, why do some railway clocks have more than one minute hand?

programme.title: The Civil War's Lost Massacre
programme.desc: The search for remains of formerly enslaved Black Union soldiers brutally murdered by angry Southerners as the Civil War was ending. Plus, a deep dive into Camp Nelson, Kentucky, the military base where these soldiers and thousands of others got their freedom papers

programme.title: Constantine the Great
programme.desc: The concluding episode follows the emperor's archaeological traces to the new Rome, Constantinople, where his claim to power knows no bounds

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: China: Treasures of the Jade Empire
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of China's Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the country's cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians explore the life of the South Devon branch line before the Beeching cuts of the 1960s. Peter Ginn joins a footplate crew and receives coal-shovelling tips from a veteran steam engine driver of 63 years' experience, and with Alex he learns about one of Scotland's most lucrative exports. Ruth Goodman finds out about the dangers involved in working on the Victorian railways, and how those who lost limbs were catered for by a dedicated prosthetics workshop. She also discovers how the railways came to the rescue when a deadly disease wiped out almost the entire stock of London cattle

programme.title: RAF at 100 with Ewan and Colin McGregor
programme.desc: The actor and his former pilot brother present a celebration of the Royal Air Force's centenary, taking to the skies in iconic planes from the First World War to the present day. They also meet service personnel from throughout the RAF's history, including a veteran of the Battle of Britain, former female members of the Air Transport Auxiliary, crew members who had the responsibility of dropping the atom bomb, modern-day Typhoon fighter crews, and the last pilot to be involved in a dogfight

programme.title: Prisoner Number A26188
programme.desc: The story of a Jewish girl who lost her father, brother and sister during the Nazi occupation of Poland in the Second World War. Now in her eighties, Henia's testimony begins with her family's removal from their home in Radom, to the ghetto, then on to Plaszow concentration camp, Majdanek, Auschwitz and finally Bergen-Belsen. She describes the horrors she experienced and how, through a combination of her own resourcefulness and luck, she survived, witnessed the birth of Israel and eventually started a new life in Africa

programme.title: Plunderer: The Life and Times of a Nazi Art Thief
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jonathan Petropoulos investigates the life of former Nazi art dealer Bruno Lohse, who became Hermann Göring's personal collector, tasked with finding desirable works of art. After the Second World War, Lohse spent a brief time in prison but later resumed his career as a dealer, often trading in art looted during the conflict

programme.title: The New Statesman
programme.sub-title: The Irresistible Rise of Alan B'Stard
programme.desc: Alan meddles with mountains of untaxed money lying hidden in the Channel Islands. Satirical comedy, with Rik Mayall

programme.title: A Clock Work Blue (1972)
programme.desc: A bumbling researcher is hurled through time, stumbling into the sensual secrets and erotic escapades that shaped civilization's wildest moments. Erotic comedy drama, starring Tracy Handfuss

programme.title: Invasion of the Bee Girls (1973)
programme.desc: A strange force transforms women into bizarre creatures which kill their male victims by wearing them out sexually. Erotic sci-fi adventure, starring Victoria Vetri, William Smith and Anitra Ford

programme.title: Carnival of Souls (1962)
programme.desc: A woman miraculously escapes death in a horrific car crash which claims the lives of her friends - but later finds herself haunted by strange visions and ghostly apparitions which draw her to a deserted carnival. Horror, starring Candace Hilligoss, Frances Feist, Sidney Berger and Art Ellison

programme.title: Stereo Underground
programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative Xmas anthems from a music community with attitude.

programme.title: Heather Ann (1983)
programme.desc: Entangled in an affair with a hotelier's wife and unable to repay a loan, a Cornish trawlerman struggles with his marriage and his troubles deepen when he hauls up a torpedo. Drama, starring Maurice Roeves and Susan Penhaligon

programme.title: The New Statesman
programme.desc: It appears Alan has turned over a new leaf when he agrees to help war-stricken Yugoslavia - but he has his own interests at heart

programme.title: The New Statesman
programme.sub-title: The Irresistible Rise of Alan B'Stard
programme.desc: Alan meddles with mountains of untaxed money lying hidden in the Channel Islands. Satirical comedy, with Rik Mayall

programme.title: Turbulence - The Story of Ryanair
programme.desc: The story of Ryanair's 40-year ascension from a single route airline that challenged the likes of Aer Lingus to a giant of European aviation, with input from insiders, commentators and former staff

programme.title: All That Remains with Niall Breslin
programme.desc: The rugby player-turned-academic and mental health advocate sets out on an emotional quest to remember more than 1,300 people buried in unmarked graves in the grounds of the former St Loman's psychiatric hospital in his native Mullingar. He uncovers stories of adults and children who were committed, died and buried under numbered metal crosses without names. Today, even those crosses have been removed. He explores the burial practices of patients unclaimed after death and investigates how many more institutional graveyards there are like this around the country - and what can be done to respect and protect them

programme.title: Masters: Keepers of Tradition
programme.desc: A look at Irish practitioners of rare, traditional and remarkable crafts and skills, starting with one of the country's finest stone carvers, Julia Gebel. She first arrived in Ireland from Germany to work on the restoration of Cormac's Chapel at the Rock of Cashel, the ancient seat of the Kings of Munster. Here she takes on a commission for a bust of Irish revolutionary Dick Barrett

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie Molloy explores more of Ireland's most reasonably priced homes, joined by building engineer Kieran McCarthy, who advises house hunters about the condition of the properties. They begin by heading to Carlow to help find a home for civil servant Laura, who wants to escape the rising costs of Dublin

programme.title: Build Your Own Home
programme.desc: Harrison Gardner is in Westmeath, helping Rose and Marguax as they renovate a stone cottage - a project that includes building a timber-framed extension - while also handling the pressure and excitement of expecting their first baby

programme.title: Hooked
programme.desc: Dr Brian Pennie lifts the lid on how modern addictions are rewiring people's brains, and asks what they can do to break free. In the first episode, Dr Pennie focuses on phones, gaming and gambling, interwoven with his personal story of going from heroin addiction to becoming a neuroscientist and lecturer at Trinity College Dublin

programme.title: An Ghig Mhór
programme.desc: Five-piece band Leevy from the Múscraí Gaeltacht in West Cork prepare a big gig under the mentorship of singer-songwriter Rónán Ó Snodaigh, founding member of Kíla. In Irish

As Babs feels like she's letting Carol down, Victor finds a way to kill two birds with one stone

programme.title: The End of the World with Beanz
programme.desc: People have always cared about their appearance, but in the age of social media, many seem to be in the pursuit of perfection. Martin Beanz Warde is joined by actress Norma Sheahan to explore the ever increasing pursuit of physical perfection, a journey that sees one of them try botox for the first time. Beans also travels to Germany to meet a man undergoing an aesthetic procedure that is both transformational and terrifying

programme.title: The Dry
programme.desc: After the shocking events of late, Shiv is feeling more pressure than ever to revisit old vices. The rest of the siblings deal with the fallout from the disastrous family meeting

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Melanie Chisholm - aka Sporty Spice - researches her family tree. Both sides of Melanie's family come from Liverpool and the singer is fascinated to discover her great-grandmother was a moneylender, while her fourth great-grandfather was a campaigner seeking to improve working men's lives and rights. Melanie is keen to explore a family rumour about an Irish connection, and before long learns that some of her ancestors fled the famine in Ireland

programme.title: Thelma & Louise (1991)
programme.desc: Two world-weary friends flee their dull dead end lives for a weekend road trip. However, when they kill a would-be rapist in self-defence, they make a fateful decision to run from the law, sparking a chain of events destined to end in tragedy. Ridley Scott's drama, starring Geena Davis, Susan Sarandon, Harvey Keitel, Michael Madsen and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Though the team members are looking forward to welcoming a new recruit into their midst, Mervin, in contrast, cannot wait to get away from the island. However, before he catches his flight, he becomes embroiled in the murder of a young man whose body has been recovered from a ravine. The case becomes more compelling when it is discovered the victim has left behind a mysterious message. Drama, starring Don Gilet and Don Warrington

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 26 Live
programme.desc: Mexico v South Africa (Kick-off 8.00pm). Joanne Cantwell presents coverage of the Group A match at Mexico City Stadium, which serves as the opening game of the tournament. This is the fifth overall meeting between these nations, with the most recent also being the opening contest of the 2010 World Cup in South Africa, which ended in a 1-1 draw. That was the last time Bafana Bafana competed in a World Cup and, as with their two other tournament appearances in 1998 and 2002, they failed to progress beyond the group stage, whereas El Tricolor finished second in the group to progress to the last-16, where they were beaten 3-1 by Argentina. Last time out in Qatar they failed to progress from a group that also included Argentina, Poland and Saudi Arabia, and their best-ever performances in the 17 previous appearances saw them reach the quarter-final stage as sole hosts in both 1970 and 1986

programme.title: Twitter: Breaking the Bird
programme.desc: The inside story of the tech entrepreneurs who created the social media app Twitter. At first the site grew on the back of celebrities who realised it offered them a direct way to communicate with fans. After going global, it seemed to be fulfilling the founders' dream of a digital utopia where all voices would be heard. But as hate speech and misinformation flooded the platform, the founders faced growing problems to control it - and the sale to Elon Musk in 2022 represented the end of their dream

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 26 Live
programme.desc: South Korea v Czechia (Kick-off 3.00am). Coverage of the Group A match at Guadalajara Stadium in Mexico. The Koreans are appearing at their 11th tournament in succession, and a 12th overall, and qualified after going unbeaten in 16 total matches in two rounds of qualifying in the Asian Confederation. Their best-ever performance at a World Cup saw them finish fourth in 2002 when they served as co-hosts alongside Japan, but since then they have failed to progress beyond the last-16, which was as far as they went four years ago in Qatar after suffering a 4-1 loss to Brazil in Doha. For Czechia, this is their first appearance at a World Cup since 2006 in Germany, and they were made to work hard for their place as they finished second in their qualifying group behind Croatia, which led to a place in the play-offs where they triumphed twice in penalty shootouts against Republic of Ireland and Denmark after both games ended in 2-2 draws

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 26 Live
programme.desc: USA v Paraguay (Kick-off 2.00am). Clare MacNamara presents coverage of the Group D match at Los Angeles Stadium in Inglewood. While the Americans were guaranteed a place in this tournament as one of the three co-hosts, Paraguay progressed from the CONMEBOL qualification process, and though they finished sixth in the standings, they were one of four teams to finish tied on 28 points and were just one point behind second-placed Ecuador. There have been nine previous meetings between these nations, the first of which saw the USA claim a 3-0 victory at the inaugural World Cup in Uruguay in 1930, and most recently they clashed in a friendly encounter in November last year, when the United States triumphed by a 2-1 scoreline

programme.desc: Profile of the author, widely regarded as a pioneer of science-fiction, comedy, technology and environmental activism. His philosophy and the ideas he had are now seen as meaningful and visionary. Contributors include Stephen Fry, Griff Rhys Jones, Mary Allen, Jon Canter and John Lloyd

programme.title: Sky Arts Book Club
programme.sub-title: The Sky Arts Book Club Summer Reads Special
programme.desc: Elizabeth Day and Andi Oliver are joined by actress Minnie Driver and author Caleb Azumah Nelson to talk about their latest books, while Simon Savidge provides recommendations

programme.title: Hugh Grant: Love Language
programme.desc: Documentary charting the career of the English actor, whose wit, charisma and vulnerability made him a defining figure in romantic comedies. From his breakout performance in Four Weddings and a Funeral to his roles in Notting Hill and Love Actually, this film delves into Grant's ability to capture the nuances of love, relationships and human connections on screen

programme.title: André Rieu: Romantic Paradise
programme.desc: The violinist and his Johann Strauss Orchestra perform in Cortona, Tuscany, playing pieces including Nino Rota's Love Theme from The Godfather

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A crooked antiques dealer masquerading as a clergyman encounters a farmer - who gives him a piece of furniture worth a fortune. Starring John Gielgud and Bernard Miles

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A scorned husband seeks revenge on his wife and her lover - but is not certain who the man is. Starring Denholm Elliott and Joss Ackland

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man hatches a plan to kill his wife by buying her a new pet that may not be very cuddly and lovable, but might give him the way out that he desires

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A crime boss gives a new employee an assignment to kill another man, but the intended victim tempts him with another offer

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the Australian actress, who starred in Dead Calm, Moulin Rouge! and Eyes Wide Shut and won an Academy Award for her portrayal of Virginia Woolf in The Hours

programme.title: The Myth of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: A profile of the actress, examinng the truth behind her seemingly fairy-tale transformation and the shining example of the mythical American dream it evoked

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman's eye transplant leads her lover to see her in a new light. Starring Amanda Redman and Anthony Valentine

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man takes revenge for being left out of the Christmas celebrations at his office party. Starring Robert Morley, with Amanda Redman

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A farmer buys a strange jar at a carnival. His wife is scared of it, but townspeople come from miles to see it - and finder Charlie becomes a local celebrity. Drama, starring Pat Buttram and Collin Wilcox

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Documentary about the making of Def Leppard's 1987 album Hysteria, which produced seven hit singles but took the heavy metal legends to the limits of their physical and emotional endurance. Including interviews with lead singer Joe Elliott and other members of the band, as well as archive performances

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the Welsh actor, who was 13 when he starred in Empire of the Sun and has since played Bruce Wayne in Christopher Nolan's Batman films and won an Oscar for The Fighter

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.sub-title: Angela Griffin, Gina McKee & Jamael Westman
programme.desc: Stephen Mangan and Joan Bakewell host the painting contest. Nine contestants paint celebrity sitters Angela Griffin, Gina McKee and Jamael Westman, before the judges decide who to send through to the next round of the competition

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Two archaeologists get less than they bargained for while trying to steal a priceless treasure from a tomb. Starring Nigel Havers and Richard Johnson

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A would-be burglar is confused when his intended victim - an elderly lady - appears to befriend him. Drama, with Siobhan McKenna and Patrick Field

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: JJ Bunce offers to kill John Treadwell's elderly mother-in-law for a fee, but the suggestion is rejected out of hand - at first

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A married man captures an armed criminal who tried to rob him and his mistress, but to avoid a scandal, he contemplates whether to let him go or kill him

programme.title: Dolly Parton: America Reunited
programme.desc: A look at how the country star manages to unite a divided America, becoming the last unifying figure of US culture in a country that has never been so disunited

programme.title: Down the Tracks: The Music That Influenced Led Zeppelin
programme.desc: Exploring the music that helped shape the rock band, including the blues and English folk music, as well as influence of the novels of JRR Tolkien

programme.title: John Lee Hooker: That's My Story
programme.desc: The life of the highly influential blues legend, who ran away from home at the age of 14 and finally settled in Detroit, where he worked in the steel industry during the day and played in the city's clubs at night. Featuring music from the singer's career, which spanned more than 60 years. Part of Detroit Night

programme.title: Nina Simone: The Lost Album
programme.desc: Documentary about a previously unknown album by the singer-songwriter, who was one of the most gifted vocalists and musiciand of her generation

programme.title: Isle of Wight Festival 2025
programme.desc: Highlights of the event held at Seaclose Park, Newport, where the headline acts were Sting, Stereophonics and Justin Timberlake

programme.title: Paul Simon: Live at Webster Hall, New York
programme.desc: A June 2011 concert by the singer, recorded on the final night of his So Beautiful or So What tour, which saw him playing at small clubs and theatres across the USA. Featuring songs including The Obvious Child, Kodachrome, Gone at Last, Mother and Child Reunion, Dazzling Blue, Rewrite and The Afterlife

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent. At a meeting with Silver Sky executve Kate McKitterick, Danvers balks when Connelly shares the official cause of the Tsalal men's deaths - and gets a warning against pursuing the case any further. Later, Hank receives a quid pro quo offer

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: Dunk appeals to various lords in order to gain entrance into the tournament, but Egg advises him to hold on to his pride. When the Targaryens arrive at Ashford, Dunk seizes his moment with Prince Baelor

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After Egg attempts to train Dunk's stubborn horse, the knight teaches his new squire an important skill. As they take in the tourney's first full day of events, Dunk receives a proposition from the Ashford steward that could help secure his future

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: After learning her longtime signature scent is being discontinued, Deborah prompts an unexpected detour, where she has a shaky reunion with former comedian friend Susan. Meanwhile, Kayla surprises Jimmy by stepping up at work. Jean Smart stars

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: When Deborah grows increasingly frustrated over her new material's missing 'spark', Kiki, Ava and her mother Nina take Deborah out for a girls' night. As Ava attempts to connect with her mother, Deborah embraces some unexpected company. Comedy drama, starring Jean Smart

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: George heads to Pittsburgh to deal with the potential strike, while Bertha learns that the Duke will return for the Metropolitan Opera's opening night. Bannister tries to retrieve an incriminating letter from the Russell house

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: Bertha begins to rethink her loyalty to the Metropolitan Opera, an engagement party leaves Marian full of doubts, and George strikes a deal with union leader Bill Henderson

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Part two of two. Another priest is murdered after the two Guatemalan political refugees suspected of killing the first one are set free

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Maritime Inn landlady Pat gets her first full house of the season as Brixham's tourist trade picks up for the summer - but refuses to hire anyone to help her with the extra work. Powerboat instructor Mike Weatherbee tries to enforce the laws of the sea, carpet-cleaner Dave Satchwill prepares to lead the town's popular ghost tour, and lone fisherman Dave Brown reveals his unusual methods

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: August arrives and the fishermen of Brixham spend time ashore with their families as their boats are repaired - but summer proves costly for Jan, who loses £1,000 for every day his vessel is out of action. Apprentice deckhand Logan has to decide whether a life at sea is the right choice for him and his family, and seafood seller Jenny receives a surprise on her 65th birthday

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A man is discovered to have been buried alive, leaving Pembleton and Bayliss investigating a murder. Meanwhile, Munch and Kellerman examine a horrific car crash that was apparently no accident. Richard Belzer stars

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Pembleton and Falsone are assigned to a case involving the death of an elderly man thought to have been killed by his grandson's pit bulls

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles to sell her new set as a comedy special, Deborah pitches a role to a former collaborator, and Ava experiences a number of fortuitous run-ins

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: After securing an offer from her ideal venue, Deborah prepares to take the stage for her taping. Jimmy learns his clients are being poached by a formidable foe, while Ava deals with a new opportunity.

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Christina questions the nature of her reality, while Charlotte gives William the task of tracking down a human outlier who has breached

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Two teenagers come to town with a tale that they're in search of their runaway father, but when they see the two rival saloons the dollar signs ring up in their eyes and they decide to split up and each take a job at separate establishments. Meanwhile, tensions rise when Bullock returns with a fresh ultimatum for Swearengen

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The people of the town begin to latch on to what Miles and Flora are up to, and decide it's time for someone to put a stop to their games. Meanwhile, a vaccine arrives which is to be administered for smallpox

programme.title: The Regime
programme.desc: Christmas approaches amid escalating violence, but Elena remains determined not to abandon her people, despite being advised to leave the palace. Schiff, Singer and Huber imagine a scenario where the chancellor could be removed

programme.title: Under Salt Marsh
programme.desc: Former detective turned teacher Jackie Ellis discovers the body of 8-year-old pupil Cefin, seemingly drowned. Crime drama, starring Kelly Reilly and Rafe Spall

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Pembleton and Falsone are assigned to a case involving the death of an elderly man thought to have been killed by his grandson's pit bulls

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the city's famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Ireland's oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the world's oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the world's most luxurious hotels and begins in Miami's South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatra's regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the world's highest swimming pool

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss and Pembleton investigate a terminally ill man's death which is not as natural as it first seems. Hard-hitting police drama, starring Kyle Secor and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: When a four-year-old boy disappears from a carousel, Falsone and Stivers catch the case and are joined by the entire homicide unit

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah finally gets a chance to break out a custom gown that's been in her closet for years for an award ceremony in Montreal. Jimmy and Kayla hustle to land new clients. Comedy, starring Jean Smart, Paul W Downs and Megan Stalter

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah and Ava struggle to stay out of one another's orbits - especially when Deborah lands an unexpected opportunity after finally agreeing to appear on Late Night. Marcus transforms a cottage into 'Vance's House'. Comedy, starring Jean Smart, Paul W Downs and Megan Stalter

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Caleb uncovers a disturbing truth as he attempts to escape from Charlotte's interrogation and Bernard and C make their way to the resistance hideout

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The inhabitants of the crime-riddled town call for a despotic government to rule over the commune and so Farnum is installed as mayor, with Utter as Fire Commissioner. Starring William Sanderson and Dayton Callie

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: A Chinese immigrant comes to town and, with the help of some pioneering translation techniques, manages to inform Swearengen that his shipment of opium has been stolen by two addicts

programme.title: The Regime

Period drama, starring Carrie Coon and Morgan Spector

programme.desc: Concerned about Peggy's worsening condition, Agnes and Ada welcome her parents and their physician Dr Kirkland to 61st Street. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the world's highest swimming pool

programme.title: American Gangster (2007)
programme.desc: The story of 1970s drug kingpin Frank Lucas, whose innovative methods of smuggling heroin into the US made him one of the leading figures in the New York underworld. A detective is assigned to bring Lucas's empire down, but his investigation is undermined by police corruption. Ridley Scott's fact-based crime drama, starring Denzel Washington, Russell Crowe, Chiwetel Ejiofor and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome (1985)
programme.desc: The nomadic warrior pitches up in the city of a cut-throat desert community in search of his stolen vehicle and ends up making a deal with a local dictator to get rid of her rival for power. However, when the bargain turns sour, he is cast out into the wilderness - where he becomes the unlikely protector of a tribe of feral youngsters. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Tina Turner and Bruce Spence

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths (2012)
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Black Bag (2025)
programme.desc: When a spy is suspected of treason, her husband faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country. Director Steven Soderbergh's thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Cate Blanchett and Rege-Jean Page

programme.title: After Yang (2022)
programme.desc: When his young daughter's beloved companion, an android named Yang, malfunctions, a man called Jake searches for a way to repair him. In the process, Jake discovers the life that has been passing in front of him, reconnecting with his wife and daughter across a distance he didn't know was there. Sci-fi drama, starring Colin Farrell and Jodie Turner-Smith

programme.title: After Earth (2013)
programme.desc: A spaceship crash leaves a renowned war hero and his 13-year-old son stranded on Earth, which was abandoned by the human race centuries ago. Since mankind's departure, the planet has become home to all manner of dangerous life-forms, and the boy must make a desperate journey across hostile terrain to secure a rescue for his injured father. Sci-fi adventure, starring Will and Jaden Smith, with Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: The Fifth Element (1997)
programme.desc: In the 23rd century, the world faces destruction from a seemingly unstoppable force of pure evil. Meanwhile, a New York cab driver encounters a mysterious woman destined to save the Earth from its fate, and has to protect her from a scheming arms dealer and a horde of alien mercenaries. Luc Besson's sci-fi adventure, starring Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Gravity (2013)
programme.desc: Two astronauts are left stranded in orbit above the Earth when the debris from an exploding satellite destroys their shuttle. Left drifting in space with no way to contact mission control, they begin a perilous journey to reach the safety of a space station before their oxygen supply runs out. Thriller, starring Sandra Bullock and George Clooney

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: The world is thrown into uproar when 12 alien spaceships arrive at locations around the globe. As tensions rise between nations and fear of the arrivals grows, a recently bereaved linguist is recruited by the US army to find a way to communicate with the aliens and discover why they have come. Sci-fi drama, starring Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Paycheck (2003)
programme.desc: An engineer carries out a top-secret job on the understanding that his knowledge of the task will be erased from his mind afterwards to protect his employer's intellectual property. However, waking after the memory-wiping procedure, he is shocked to learn he had somehow agreed to waive the huge payment due to him - and is wanted for a murder he does not remember committing. John Woo's thriller, starring Ben Affleck, Uma Thurman and Aaron Eckhart

programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: A Texan hunter who took a stash of money abandoned at the site of a botched drug deal is pursued across the state by an implacable hitman with no qualms about killing anyone who gets in his way. Meanwhile, a world-weary sheriff struggles to make sense of the escalating chain of violence. The Coen brothers' Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Josh Brolin, Javier Bardem, Tommy Lee Jones, Kelly Macdonald and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Gladiator II (2024)
programme.desc: After losing his home, Lucius, the son of a slain Roman General, is forced to enter the Colosseum in an attempt to bring glory back to Rome. Ridley Scott's historical drama sequel, starring Paul Mescal, Pedro Pascal and Denzel Washington, with Connie Nielsen and Derek Jacobi reprising their roles from the first film

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.desc: When a spy is suspected of treason, her husband faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country. Director Steven Soderbergh's thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Cate Blanchett and Rege-Jean Page

Equally massive robots, each controlled by two human pilots with their minds linked, are created to fight back against the creatures. Sci-fi adventure, starring Charlie Hunnam, Rinko Kikuchi and Idris Elba

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielberg's action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielberg's dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Empire of the Sun (1987)
programme.desc: An English boy living in Shanghai is separated from his parents during the Japanese invasion and forced to live on the streets. The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielberg's Second World War drama based on JG Ballard's semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers

programme.title: Pacific Rim (2013)
programme.desc: A rift between dimensions opens up at the bottom of the Pacific ocean, and Earth is invaded by gigantic alien monsters. Equally massive robots, each controlled by two human pilots with their minds linked, are created to fight back against the creatures. Sci-fi adventure, starring Charlie Hunnam, Rinko Kikuchi and Idris Elba

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: Cameron Cade is predicted to be the next great quarterback of American football. During a night-time training session, he suffers a traumatic brain injury. Cameron agrees to attend a week-long boot camp run by retiring star quarterback Isaiah White at his secluded desert compound. However, Cade's life soon turns into a nightmare. Supernatural horror, starring Marlon Wayans and Tyriq Withers

programme.title: The Plague (2025)
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Thriller, starring Joel Edgerton and Everett Blunck

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge (2025)
programme.desc: During the Second World War, Finland reluctantly cedes territory to the invading Red Army. Former Army commando Aatami Korpi is among the affected and returns to his family plot to deconstruct his timber-framed home and relocate the wooden beams on a truck across the new border separating the Soviet Union and Finland. The legend of the 'the man who refuses to die' remains a thorn in the side of the Soviet army, and a nameless KGB officer agrees to liberate high-ranking brute Igor Draganov from a Siberian prison in exchange for killing Aatami. Finnish action sequel, starring Jorma Tommila, Stephen Lang and Richard Brake

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: The Internship (2026)
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, the Internship, to violently destroy the organisation. Thriller, starring Lizzy Greene, Megan Boone and Sky Katz

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Fuze (2026)
programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire (2026)
programme.desc: Tony Kiritsis is convinced mortgage broker ML Hall cheated him out of profits from a land development deal and he vows revenge. Tony walks into a branch of the Meridian Mortgage company for a meeting with ML, only to find his target is on holiday and the appointment will be with ML's son Richard instead. Regardless, Tony reveals a shotgun and holds Richard hostage for his father's supposed crimes. Director Gus Van Sant's thriller, starring Bill Skarsgård, Al Pacino and Dacre Montgomery

In this documentary, Sara Payne relives the day her daughter went missing and recounts the horror and agonising days that unfolded in its wake. programme.desc: A documentary on the death of Rhys Jones, an 11-year-old who was shot and killed while walking home from football practice in Croxteth, Liverpool, in August 2007. The assailant was 18-year-old Sean Mercer, who was firing at rival gang members and hit the child in the process. An investigation to bring Mercer and his gang to justice created tension in the area and caused untold pain to the family, but the perpetrator was eventually sentenced to 22 years behind bars and six other gang members were also jailed

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis

programme.desc: Glenn reveals to everyone that the barn is full of captured walkers - news that infuriates Shane, who decides they all need to be destroyed. Dale tries to hide the group's weapons in the woods to prevent a conflict, but ultimately fails and the arms cache is taken back to base. Meanwhile, Rick and Hershel return with two more captives, planning to keep them alive, but this pushes Shane over the edge and he forces the survivors into a bloody confrontation

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Roma and Ronnie are shocked when a driver in Slough, Berkshire, records the highest reading they have ever seen in a breathalyser test, and Chris captures an innovative supermarket thief. The Liverpool Air Support Unit uses heat-sensing cameras to track down a criminal who has taken refuge underneath Blackpool pier

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The cops are puzzled by the murder of a wealthy couple and a missing artefact linked to the Royal League, a long-forgotten secret society. A conspiracy theorist (played by Jorge Garcia, Lost) thinks he knows what's going on, but should he be trusted? Meanwhile, Catherine spends her last day with the Navy. Alex O'Loughlin, Scott Caan and Michelle Borth star

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo is reeling from the aftermath of his decision to speak out to the press and relocates to a quiet town in Mexico to reassess his life and professional future, only to find himself reluctantly drawn into one local family's fight for justice. Return of the crime drama, starring Shemar Moore

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Hondo is still in Mexico and teams up with a local cop for a dangerous rescue mission, while back in Los Angeles, Hicks considers disbanding the team for good

programme.desc: All the big stories of the morning plus news making interviews, analysis and eyewitness reports from around the world.

programme.desc: Sam goes undercover as a fighter to catch the leader of a gang dealing drugs on the streets. Guest starring professional wrestler Sheamus

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack auditions to be a dancer for guest star Janet Jackson, but Karen has other ideas. Meanwhile, a broken-hearted Grace becomes addicted to attending Alcoholics Anonymous meetings and causes friction between Will and Vince

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa gets her hands on a collection of keys to every door in Springfield, and soon uncovers a hidden classroom beneath the school, telling Principal Skinner about her discovery. He confiscates the key from her, but she remains determined to investigate the mysterious room

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders embarks on a whirlwind romance with Mrs Krabappel after he saves the schoolteacher's life when she tried to escape a detention room at Springfield Elementary. However, things start to unravel when she reveals how many men she has slept with - a list that includes Homer and Aerosmith drummer Joey Krammer

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: A spoonbill gets corrective shoes and a kookaburra has surgery. The team help a trio of troubled baby wallabies and a koala is having seizures

programme.sub-title: A Ia La Aku (From This Day Forward)

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: The team races to stop a violent band of armed robbers, but the search is complicated by civilians using a public safety app that encourages vigilantism. Meanwhile, Street receives difficult news that alters his future

'Big Boy' Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

Family animation, with the voices of Sam Hardy, Hannah Herman Cortes, Pierce Brosnan and Brendan Gleeson

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willie's dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: The Ant Bully (2006)
programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village (2017)
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a quest into the Forbidden Forest, leading to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history. Animated adventure, with the voices of Demi Lovato, Julia Roberts, Rainn Wilson and Joe Manganiello

programme.title: Happy Feet (2006)
programme.desc: A young penguin disappoints his fellow seabirds with his inability to sing - but instead he displays a remarkable talent for tap dancing. However, his elders refuse to accept this outlandish behaviour and send the youngster into exile, marking the start of a wonderful journey. Animated adventure, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Nicole Kidman and Hugh Jackman

programme.title: Happy Feet Two (2011)
programme.desc: A tap-dancing penguin goes searching for his missing son, but his search leads him to discover a drifting iceberg that threatens to destroy his colony. He sets out to unite all the birds in the Antarctic to avert the catastrophe. Animated musical comedy sequel, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Ava Acres and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar (2014)
programme.desc: Heroic flightless birds Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico uncover a plot to take over the world. Needing help to foil the evil scheme, they seek out a secret society of animal agents, led by a heroic wolf. Animated comedy spin-off, with the voices of Benedict Cumberbatch, John Malkovich and Tom McGrath

programme.title: The Boss Baby (2017)
programme.desc: A youngster believes his baby brother is actually a power-hungry tycoon sent to destroy his perfect family life. However, the duo must put aside their differences and work together when they uncover a plot to sabotage the company their parents work for. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Alec Baldwin, Steve Buscemi, Jimmy Kimmel and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Dog Man (2025)
programme.desc: A half-human canine is sworn to protect and serve as he faces feline supervillain Petey the Cat. Animated comedy, with the voices of Pete Davidson, Poppy Liu, Lil Rel Howery and Isla Fisher

programme.title: The LEGO Movie (2014)
programme.desc: An ordinary man leading a life of blissful ignorance in a city made of the construction toy is mistakenly identified as a chosen one destined to save the universe. He joins a mismatched band of heroes in stopping a plan to fix the world permanently in place. Animated comedy, with the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks, Morgan Freeman and Will Ferrell

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: Trolls (2016)
programme.desc: A tribe of perpetually happy fuzzy-headed creatures are kidnapped by a race of giants who intend to eat them. The princess of the clan escapes and plans a rescue mission - but to save her friends, she will need the help of a grumpy troll with a loathing of music who has rejected their joyful culture to live as a loner. Animated musical, with the voices of Anna Kendrick and Justin Timberlake

programme.desc: Part two of two. The key role depictions of Gaelic games in the emergence of a distinctive Irish film culture. programme.desc: In Donegal, Gráinne McElwain discovers the county has strong historical links to both hurling and camogie. She finds out about a much-loved priest who has three cups named in his honour and a local club whose silverware commemorates some of its members who were lost tragically before their time. Gráinne also calls into the county home grounds Páirc Mhic Cumhaill, to find out about The Democrat Cup and the importance local newspapers played in Donegal's Gaelic games sporting tradition

programme.title: Jim Driscoll, Dornálaí
programme.desc: Documentary charting the almost forgotten story of an Irish-Welsh boy who worked his way to the top of the world boxing ranks, while never forgetting his roots. Jim Driscoll was born into poverty in the Irish slums of Cardiff in 1880, but after his boxing career and early death from tuberculosis in 1925, over 100,000 people attended his funeral. Boxing experts talk about his unique ability and the programme uses a mix of reconstructions and archive material to showcase Jim's skill in the ring and his humanity outside it

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny starts her own hair accessories business and the orders start to pile in. However, she makes the mistake of asking Sheldon to help, leading to frustration and regret. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny feels threatened when a sexy actress, who has landed a role in TV series CSI, moves into the apartment building, and gradually begins to sense that her friends are being manipulated by the new arrival. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart takes Penny out for a second date, during which she drunkenly reveals her true feelings. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Returning to the boutique Natalie is terrified that after everything she's been through, she'll no longer love the dress she chose two years ago.

programme.title: Doomwatch (1972)
programme.desc: A scientist is sent to an island off the Cornish coast to investigate pollution. What he discovers is far more terrifying - a chemical that has been dumped in the water is causing the islanders to develops strange mutations. Sci-fi thriller, starring Ian Bannen and Judy Geeson

programme.title: Real Thick Glasses
programme.desc: Soloman Watkins' quirky take as he interviews Michael, owner of the world's most unique collection of Really Thick Glasses. Funded and supported by Together TV and Cat Flap Media.

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for the neon sign of a Soho sex shop and a piece of the wedding cake of William and Catherine, the Prince and Princess of Wales. Plus, one of only five remaining copies of Henry Beck's redesign of the London Tube map dating back to the 1930s

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques expert Roo Irvine, trader Danny Sebastian and upcycling blacksmith Kevin Paxton head to the Scottish Borders to rummage through its antique shops, scrap yards and flea markets in the hope of finding items they can each turn into a healthy profit. When the day is done and they've got their items, they have just three weeks to turn them into cash

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Teleshopping feature bringing you the hottest destinations and latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Debra from Wigan, Greater Manchester, wants her new build plot to be transformed into a calming zen garden for relaxation and contemplation. She'd also like it to be low maintenance and maximise the views from the woodland beyond. Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill try to bring her vision to life on a budget of £6,000

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam meet Danni and Dawn, a couple from Biggleswade who want a whimsical wonderland in their back garden for their five-year-old twins. With a £5,000 budget, designers Charlie and Flo are ready to let their creative juices flow

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Brecon Beacons couple Rob and Rachel Jones have little time to do any gardening as they are busy raising five children, including an autistic son and a daughter with cerebral palsy. Their garden is a mishmash of unconnected areas that they want to transform into a space that can bring all the family together. Enter Alan Titchmarsh and the team, who set about making their dreams come true, adding a bespoke barbecue, a huge gazebo, a water feature, an area for the teenagers and a range of plants that appeal to all five senses

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave is in Gosport knocking down an internal wall to turn a property's outside toilet into a cloakroom

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Reclaimed bricks are used during a masterclass in old-English brickwork from the ground up

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts buyers bid for Oasis lyrics hand-written by frontman Noel Gallagher for his brother Liam, a pair of Nike trainers with a £4,000 reserve, a sculpture by British artist Anish Kapoor and some vintage Louis Vuitton luggage with an interesting history

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach is in Lisbon, where tour guide Brendan Sheerin drops a vote twist that puts one couple under instant pressure. The group also make Portuguese custard tarts

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team create a horticultural haven for 90-year-old grandmother Iris Insole from Barking, east London, who has found gardening difficult since the death of her husband. A new path and wildlife-friendly roses are among the features they add - along with a summer house full of memories

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Debra from Wigan, Greater Manchester, wants her new build plot to be transformed into a calming zen garden for relaxation and contemplation. programme.title: Garden Rescue

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: A fallen scrambler with head and neck injuries is precariously lodged at the edge of a waterfall for several hours and moving him threatens further problems. However, with the cold mountain water bringing him close to hypothermia, the team has little choice. On the other side of the Lakes, a local marathon brings its own challenges as temperatures soar towards 30 degrees Celsius

programme.title: Mary Millington: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair (1979)
programme.desc: A seductive astrologer's carefree life is brought crashing to a halt when he is accused of robbery and cannot win over the only person able to provide an alibi. He faces a possibly greater challenge in providing a woman who has never had an orgasm with the satisfaction she has long been deprived of. Sex comedy, starring Alan Lake and Diana Dors

programme.title: Got It Made (1974)
programme.desc: Norfolk-set coming-of-age drama. Mere days before her wedding, an aristocratic girl discovers some hideous truths about the people closest to her. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques expert Mark Stacey, wheeler-dealer Tony Wong and upcycler Zoe Pocock head to Exeter to find some bargains they can turn into profit for Children in Need. The three experts try to outdo each other by scouring the city's antiques shops, scrap yards and flea markets in search of any items they can convert to cash. When the day is done and the time is up, they then get just three weeks to turn their goodies into gold
